title: Senior Plant Manager at Alstom India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Alstom India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!
